command_log.command: mkdir -p .wheel/outputs/team-test && echo 'Team static test started' > .wheel/outputs/team-test/setup.txt && echo 'Setup complete'
echo "Workflow started. Hooks are now active."

sleep 1 && echo "=== Parent teammates ===" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue; jq -c '.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n: .key, s: .value.status, a: .value.agent_id}' "$f"; done && echo "=== Worker states ===" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$wf" == "team-sub-worker" ]] || continue; alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "null"' "$f"); cur=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$f"); steps=$(jq -c '[.steps[] | {id:.id,s:.status}]' "$f"); echo "$alt cursor=$cur $steps"; done && echo "=== Locks ===" && ls .wheel/.locks/ 2>/dev/null || echo "none"

echo "=== Worker states ===" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$wf" == "team-sub-worker" ]] || continue; alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "null"' "$f"); cur=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$f"); st=$(jq -r '.status' "$f"); steps=$(jq -c '[.steps[] | {id:.id,s:.status}]' "$f"); echo "$alt cursor=$cur wf=$st $steps"; done && echo "=== Worker state file count ===" && ls .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | wc -l

# Manually trigger the done step for worker-1
W1_STATE=$(for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // ""' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$alt" == "worker-1@test-static-team" ]] && echo "$f"; done)
echo "Worker-1 state: $W1_STATE"
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"worker-1@test-static-team","tool_name":"Bash","tool_input":{"command":"echo test"}}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/post-tool-use.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
# Check if state file still exists
[[ -f "$W1_STATE" ]] && echo "State file exists: $(jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status}' "$W1_STATE")" || echo "State file ARCHIVED (terminal step completed)"

W1_STATE=".wheel/state_a592dd8fae61749d7.json"
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"worker-1@test-static-team"}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/stop.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
[[ -f "$W1_STATE" ]] && echo "State: $(jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status}' "$W1_STATE")" || echo "State file ARCHIVED"

echo "=== All state files ===" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do [[ -f "$f" ]] || continue; wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f"); alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "n/a"' "$f"); cur=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$f"); st=$(jq -r '.status' "$f"); echo "  $wf alt=$alt cursor=$cur status=$st"; done && echo "=== Parent teammates ===" && for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue; jq -c '.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}' "$f"; done

ls -lt .wheel/history/stopped/ 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo "---" && for f in .wheel/history/stopped/state_a*.json; do [[ -f "$f" ]] || continue; wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$wf" == "team-sub-worker" ]] || continue; alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "n/a"' "$f"); st=$(jq -r '.status' "$f"); echo "$(basename $f): alt=$alt status=$st"; done | tail -6

# Find the most recently modified archived sub-worker files
find .wheel/history/stopped -name "state_*.json" -newer .wheel/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-sub-worker" ]] && echo "$f: alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "n/a"' "$f") cursor=$(jq -r '.cursor' "$f") status=$(jq -r '.status' "$f")"
done
echo "---"
# Also check if any worker state files with alternate_agent_id exist in the stopped dir
grep -l "alternate_agent_id" .wheel/history/stopped/state_*.json 2>/dev/null | while read f; do
  alt=$(jq -r '.alternate_agent_id // "null"' "$f")
  [[ "$alt" != "null" ]] && echo "$(basename $f): $alt"
done | tail -5

# Check if workers wrote any output files in this run
find .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team -type f 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check worker output files
for w in worker-1 worker-2 worker-3; do
  echo "=== $w ==="
  ls .wheel/outputs/team-test-static-team/$w/ 2>/dev/null || echo "no dir"
done

# Re-read the subagent_stop handler to check matching
grep -A 20 "subagent_stop)" ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/lib/dispatch.sh | head -25

# Check if SubagentStop hook even routes correctly  
# Simulate SubagentStop for worker-2
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"","name":"worker-2"}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/subagent-stop.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
# Check parent state
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}' "$f"
done

# Mark workers 1 and 3 as completed too
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"","name":"worker-1"}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/subagent-stop.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"","name":"worker-3"}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/subagent-stop.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
# Check parent state
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status, teammates: [.teams["create-team"].teammates | to_entries[] | {n:.key, s:.value.status}]}' "$f"
done

steps.output:
## Static Team Test Results

Summary:
null
null

Collected outputs:
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-1/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-2/result.md
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/assignment.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/context.json
.wheel/outputs/team-test/results/worker-3/output.md

command_log.command: echo '## Static Team Test Results' && echo '' && echo 'Summary:' && cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.completed_count, .failed_count' && echo '' && echo 'Collected outputs:' && find .wheel/outputs/team-test/results/ -type f 2>/dev/null | sort

# Re-trigger SubagentStop for worker-3 to complete team-wait
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":"","name":"worker-3"}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/subagent-stop.sh 2>&1
echo "---"
# Check parent state
for f in .wheel/state_*.json; do
  wf=$(jq -r '.workflow_name' "$f" 2>/dev/null)
  [[ "$wf" == "team-static-test" ]] || continue
  jq -c '{cursor: .cursor, status: .status, step5: .steps[5].status, step6: .steps[6].status, step7: .steps[7].status}' "$f"
done

# Check output files
cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/summary.json 2>/dev/null | jq '.' || echo "No summary"
echo "---"
cat .wheel/outputs/team-test/report.txt 2>/dev/null || echo "No report"

# Trigger stop hook to process team-delete step
echo '{"session_id":"a38f8f03-472d-4275-87c2-7ebd5789d35e","agent_id":""}' | bash ~/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/wheel/000.000.000.938/hooks/stop.sh 2>&1
